title: Twelve Messages
hook: Everything typed to take a live event from spreadsheet chaos to published social content — and the method that made the other 99% happen.
for: Anyone delegating real work to an AI agent — functional through deeply technical.
get: The verbatim conversation, a five-principle method, the pipeline that runs it, and two honest failures.
do: Steal the shape: templates over outputs, constraints in the repo, judgment kept human.
previewAlt: Published Instagram story rendered by the demo's pipeline
